since_last: 57% of 100 AI names green; AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads +2.67%; AI bubble risk 49 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: a mixed, rotational tape, 57% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX +0.58% · BTC +0.21% · Gold +0.24% · Nasdaq100 +0.64%. 57% of 100 AI names are green — a mixed, rotational tape. AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech is doing the heavy lifting at +2.67%.

cards.headline: AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech leads, Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is AI Platforms, Internet & AdTech at +2.67%; weakest is Applied AI: Industrial, Defense & Vertical at -1.72%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SKHY is the standout at +27.47%
cards.body: Leaders: SKHY +27.47%, BABA +6.43%, WDAY +4.89%, POWL +4.53%, FTNT +4.13%. Laggards: IBM -25.36%, DELL -8.63%, CSCO -5.00%, ANET -4.84%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) +0.55% at $136.84
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is +0.55% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 49 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 49/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
